name: testAddMerchantAcquirer
description: Verify the active and inactive merchant acquirers can be added
descriptionHtml: Verify the active and inactive merchant acquirers can be added

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify the active and inactive merchant acquirers can be added

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select 'Merchant 1 for C112172' business unit using filter
Select '0712.165839 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Select '0712.165839 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Active status
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Inactive status
